message:
improve(perf): multi-candidate binary discovery, lock-poison recovery, QA cross-validation, and binary-size threshold bump to 22 MB

perf_budgets.rs:
- Extract binary_size_candidate_paths() searching release/perf/debug profiles
  plus CARGO_BIN_EXE_pi env override, with HashSet dedup
- read_binary_size now iterates candidates instead of hardcoding release path,
  returning the first available binary with its relative source path

perf_regression.rs:
- Extract target_dir() and pi_binary_candidates() with profile detection via
  perf_build::detect_build_profile(), env override, and release/perf/debug
  fallback chain
- pi_binary() simplified to candidate iteration with .find(exists)
- All skip messages now include checked_candidates list for debuggability via
  info_ctx structured logging
- binary_size_check uses shared target_dir() helper

performance_comparison.rs:
- Add reports_guard() that recovers from mutex poisoning instead of panicking,
  preventing cascading test failures when an earlier perf test panics
- Replace 3 inline lock().expect() calls with reports_guard()

qa_docs_policy_validation.rs:
- Add parse_f64_literal_after() helper for extracting numeric thresholds from
  source files by anchor+needle pattern
- Add binary_size_threshold_from_perf_budgets_source() and
  binary_size_threshold_from_perf_regression_source() extractors
- New test: binary_size_budget_threshold_is_consistent_between_perf_sources
  catches threshold drift between perf_budgets.rs and perf_regression.rs
- New test: binary_size_budget_event_threshold_matches_perf_budget_source
  validates budget_events.jsonl threshold against authoritative source

budget_events.jsonl:
- Bump binary_size_release threshold from 20.0 to 22.0 MB to match updated
  budget definition

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
